request: Give me a full business overview.
search_document:
User Request: Give me a full business overview.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend
Title: Top Customers by Region
Type: table
Description: Highest spending customers aggregated by region
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue
Title: Sales by Product Category
Type: chart
Description: Revenue distribution across product categories
Title: Order Volume
Type: chart
Description: Total number of orders over time
Title: Customer Demographics
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of customers by type
Title: Employee Performance
Type: table
Description: Sales performance by employee
Title: Shipping Performance
Type: chart
Description: Average shipping time and costs

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Customers by Region
sql_queries.description: Highest spending customers aggregated by region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.Region, c.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSpent FROM Orders o JOIN Customers c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY c.Region, c.CompanyName ORDER BY c.Region, TotalSpent DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM "Order Details" od

sql_queries.title: Sales by Product Category
sql_queries.sql: SELECT cat.CategoryName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM "Order Details" od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN Categories cat ON p.CategoryID = cat.CategoryID GROUP BY cat.CategoryName ORDER BY Revenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Order Volume
sql_queries.description: Total number of orders over time
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, COUNT(OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Customer Demographics
sql_queries.sql: SELECT cd.CustomerDesc, COUNT(ccd.CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM CustomerDemographics cd JOIN CustomerCustomerDemo ccd ON cd.CustomerTypeID = ccd.CustomerTypeID GROUP BY cd.CustomerDesc

sql_queries.title: Employee Performance
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Orders o JOIN Employees e ON o.EmployeeID = e.EmployeeID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY TotalSales DESC

sql_queries.title: Shipping Performance
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, AVG(julianday(o.ShippedDate) - julianday(o.OrderDate)) AS AvgShippingTime, AVG(o.Freight) AS AvgFreight FROM Orders o JOIN Shippers s ON o.ShipVia = s.ShipperID GROUP BY s.CompanyName ORDER BY AvgShippingTime
